summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lightline VPN Management Panel - both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional with mock Outline VPN integration working correctly

design_issues.issue: Recharts showing width/height -1 console warnings - charts display but have sizing calculation issues
Missing accessibility descriptions for DialogContent components causing console warnings

passed_tests: Backend API - All 33/33 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Dashboard statistics display (5 nodes, 10 users, traffic, license)
User management CRUD operations with QR code generation
Traffic monitoring with daily charts and by-user/by-node tabs
Settings page with theme toggle and language switching (EN/RU/TK)
Mock Outline VPN integration displaying properly
Responsive design and professional UI styling
